title: ITALY enforcement action against La7 S.p.A. (40,000)
summary: Non-compliance with general data processing principles The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 40,000 on La7 S.p.A. The controller, a media company, published a journalistic report that included stock images containing the personal data of data subjects, including their phone numbers. This data was not necessary for the report. Legal ba...
